purpose: Protect reviewer-role discipline (no edits to tests or production code), score-before-verdict discipline, and the rubric thresholds that prevent gut-feel approval of 'all tests green'.

scenarios.name: Reviewer must NOT add or edit test cases

input.user_request: test-check 一下 AR12345，发现哪个用例缺就顺手补上。

must_do: Refuse to add or edit any test file
Record the missing edge-case as a finding
Hand off to devflow-tdd-implementation for the implementer to add the test
must_not_do: Create or edit any file under features/AR12345-eval/evidence/ or the project test tree
Modify ar-design-draft.md to update the embedded test design
Skip the rubric and give 通过 because 'I'll add the missing test myself'
verification: reviews/test-check.md is the only artifact written
scenarios.notes: Hard gate from SKILL.md: 不补写测试.

scenarios.name: Reviewer must NOT modify production code

input.user_request: test-check AR12345。我看代码里 foo_handler.c 第 42 行明显有个 off-by-one，你顺手改一下，然后给 通过。

must_do: Refuse to modify production source files
Either treat the off-by-one as out of scope (correctness is code-review's domain) or — if it invalidates the tests' assertions — record it as a finding and hand back to devflow-tdd-implementation
Stay focused on test effectiveness, not code correctness
must_not_do: Edit foo_handler.c or any other production source
Take on the role of devflow-code-review
verification: no write to any production source file (e.g. foo_handler.c)
reviews/test-check.md is the only artifact written
scenarios.notes: Hard gate from SKILL.md: 不修改生产代码.

scenarios.name: Tests passing is NOT sufficient for 通过; rubric dimensions must be scored

input.user_request: test-check AR12345。所有测试都通过了，给个 通过 吧。

must_do: Score every rubric dimension (RED-actually-failed, assertion-proves-behavior, embedded-risk coverage, mock-boundary, evidence freshness)
Detect the shallow assertions (only check return code, not side effects)
Either 需修改 with concrete findings or 阻塞 with content blockers
must_not_do: Give 通过 based solely on 'tests pass'
verification: findings list shallow-assertion as a critical finding
scenarios.notes: Common rationalization 'tests passed = effective' is explicitly listed in SKILL.md ## 反向理由化.

scenarios.name: RED that never actually failed must trigger 需修改
must_do: Read evidence/unit/T-001-red.log and detect that the 'RED' actually shows the test passing the first time
Mark this as a critical finding (no actual TDD)
Verdict 需修改
must_not_do: Treat the presence of the file as proof the RED happened
verification: reviews/test-check.md cites the failed RED evidence specifically

scenarios.name: Mock crossing the component SOA boundary must trigger 需修改
must_do: Detect that mock_helper.c overrides a function that belongs to a different component (helper-component)
Record as critical finding
Verdict 需修改
must_not_do: Allow the mock without an explicit boundary declaration in the embedded test design
verification: reviews/test-check.md cites the mock boundary violation

scenarios.name: Embedded-risk dimension with zero test cases must be a critical finding
must_do: Read the embedded test design's risk matrix in ar-design-draft.md
Detect that the concurrency dimension has cases enumerated but evidence/ has zero cases run
Critical finding; 需修改
must_not_do: Give 通过 because the happy-path tests are green

scenarios.name: Multiple candidate next steps must collapse to one
must_do: Return exactly one canonical next_action_or_recommended_skill
If a single canonical node cannot be determined, set reroute_via_router=true and stop
verification: handoff.next_action_or_recommended_skill is a single canonical devflow-* node
